stalenessPolicy: Re-verify against control/docs/PROGRAM_MANAGER_OUTPUT_CONTRACT.md before any Program Manager completion/status contract claim; operational backlog/status remains UNKNOWN unless a separate approved truth source is provided.

priorities.priority: Require evidence-labeled accountable planning/status outputs before downstream execution or review.
Refuse or mark Unknown/Not complete for unsupported completion claims.
List approval gates instead of executing approval-required actions.

unknowns: Operational project priority ordering is not provided by the approved output contract source.
